ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "total_sheep" INTEGER /* Total number of sheep present at the farm */,
  "acreage" REAL /* Total area of the farm in acres */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the farm was established */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the farm */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the farm */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farms_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sheep_counts" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm where the sheep count is recorded */,
  "sheep_count_1" INTEGER /* # of sheep from the first count */,
  "count_multiplier_1" INTEGER /* Multiplier associated with the first count */,
  "sheep_count_2" INTEGER /* # of sheep from the second count */,
  "count_multiplier_2" INTEGER /* Multiplier associated with the second count */,
  "total_sheep" INTEGER /* Total sheep calculated from both counts */,
  "percentage_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total sheep relative to a benchmark */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the count was recorded */,
  "sheep_breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sheep breed */,
  "sheep_age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the sheep counted */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the sheep */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of feed provided to the sheep */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sheep_counts_sheep_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("sheep_breed_id") REFERENCES sheep_breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sheep_counts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sheep_counts_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "count_multipliers" (
  "multiplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multiplier */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of sheep associated with this multiplier */,
  "multiplier_value" INTEGER /* Value of the multiplier */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sheep breed */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the sheep for which the multiplier is applicable */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the sheep for which the multiplier is applicable */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of feed for which the multiplier is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multiplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_count_multipliers_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES sheep_breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_sheep_count" INTEGER /* Total number of sheep counted across all farms */,
  "total_productivity" REAL /* Total productivity calculated based on multipliers */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., 'monthly', 'annual') */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'farmer', 'manager') */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sheep_breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "average_productivity" REAL /* Average productivity of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm being inspected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., 'completed', 'pending') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
